summary.one_line: Strong cut and useful polish, but conservative editorial judgment and process deviations left quality on the table.

followed: re-transcribed output to evaluate the edit as a viewer would experience it
saved concrete learning hooks for future diff evals

deviations.description: The inferred thesis was reported but not explicitly confirmed with the operator before polish continued.
The final polish pass was not re-transcribed and verified before finalizing.

issues.title: Joke removal botched in pass 2
issues.description: A contiguous time segment contained both removable joke material and the needed conclusion, forcing an extra pass.
issues.operator_takeaway: Think in merged segment content, not only utterance indices.

issues.title: 1Password friction burned time
issues.description: Repeated auth retrievals created avoidable delay.
issues.operator_takeaway: Cache secrets retrieved once during a run when the workflow will need them repeatedly.

issues.title: Model config section may have been over-compressed
issues.description: Some authentic exploration likely got removed along with redundant fumbling.
issues.operator_takeaway: For first-look videos, authenticity can be part of the product; not all fumbling is drag.

issues.title: Zoom timing may drift after later polish changes
issues.description: Zooms were based on a preview transcript that changed slightly after the final polish pass.
issues.operator_takeaway: Any visual layer attached after editorial changes should be validated against the final timeline state.

recommendations.action: Verify merged segment content before finalizing removals when utterance indices map into contiguous edit segments.
Cache retrieved secrets instead of re-reading them multiple times during one run.
Do not skip the final re-transcription convergence check, even for small pass-3 edits.
Add tooling to diff reviewer FCPXML exports against generated timelines for ground-truth calibration.

feedback_hooks.question: Where did polish over-cut or under-cut once the operator reviewed in FCP?
feedback_hooks.how_to_compare: Diff the generated timeline against the operator's exported FCPXML.

feedback_hooks.question: Which suggested zooms survived, moved, or changed scale?
feedback_hooks.how_to_compare: Compare generated zooms against the operator's final FCPXML export.
